verification.method: Open this manifest with a cache-busting query parameter and compare buildId plus sourceCommit with the deployed page readout.
verification.cachePolicy: The page fetches this file with cache: no-store and a cacheBust query parameter.
verification.sourceCommitPolicy: This development commit cannot know its own final SHA before it exists; replace sourceCommit with the actual release commit SHA after commit/deploy verification. Current pre-change HEAD was c320f527ea6fecf3b8644f8fc7f7e8cc0aeab3d6.
